calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Set For Trial On Jan-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Post, Esq., 510.922.1365, for plaintiff Jeffrey Agustin.
Ronald Bushner, Esq., 415.433.0990, for defendant Phoenix20 DBA Phoenix 2.0 and John Sedivy.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs JOHN SEDIVY and PHOENIX20 INC. DBA PHOENIX 2.0's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is granted. Opposing party failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6B and the court's order issued on April 22, 2014. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Continued To May-22-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested.. DEFENDANTS JOHN SEDIVY and PHOENIX20 INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT is continued to May 22, 2014. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court has a courtesy copy of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
